channel.title: Machine Translation Reward Model on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Translation Reward Model on Sukai Huang

item.title: Zhiwei He Improving Machine Translation Use Quality Estimation as a Reward Model 2024
item.description: [TOC] Title: Improving Machine Translation Use Quality Estimation as a Reward Model 2024 Author: Zhiwei He et. al. Publish Year: 23 Jan 2024 Review Date: Sun, Jan 28, 2024 url: arXiv:2401.12873v1 Summary of paper Contribution In this research, the authors explore using Quality Estimation (QE) models as a basis for reward systems in translation quality improvement through human feedback. They note that while QE has shown promise aligning with human evaluations, there’s a risk of overoptimization where translations receive high rewards despite declining quality.
